notes_md:
**to** = big (in physical size). It describes something large in size, space, or scale.

Use it before a noun: *nhà to, xe to*. It also describes sound, meaning “loud” (nói to = speak loudly).  
Very common in daily talk; **lớn** is a close synonym, but **lớn** can feel a bit broader or more neutral. Opposite: **nhỏ** (small).
notes:
to = big (in physical size). It describes something large in size, space, or scale.

Use it before a noun: nhà to, xe to. It also describes sound, meaning “loud” (nói to = speak loudly).  
Very common in daily talk; lớn is a close synonym, but lớn can feel a bit broader or more neutral. Opposite: nhỏ (small).
exampleSentencesTranslated: His house is very big and has many rooms.
This dog is bigger than your cat.
I want to buy a big shirt to wear in winter.
exampleSentences: Nhà của anh rất to và có nhiều phòng.
Con chó này to hơn con mèo của chị.
Em muốn mua một cái áo to để mặc mùa đông.
